interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get data for the homepage, including featured seasons and programs, today’s games summary, and a snapshot of the user’s personal sections.

interfaces.name: getProgramFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Programs & Registration page, including seasons, divisions, days of week, and time ranges.

interfaces.name: searchProgramSessions
interfaces.description: Search league program sessions by season, division, day of week, time of day, and sort order for the Programs & Registration page.

is_weekday_only.description: If true, restrict results to weekday sessions

earliest_start_time.description: Minimum session start time in 24h format, e.g., '17:00'

latest_start_time.description: Maximum session start time in 24h format, e.g., '20:00'

interfaces.name: getProgramSessionDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific program session before registration.

interfaces.name: submitProgramRegistration
interfaces.description: Submit a registration for a selected program session, including player and guardian information and payment option.

interfaces.name: getScheduleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Games Schedule page, including divisions, teams, date presets, and sort choices.

interfaces.name: searchGames
interfaces.description: Search scheduled games by division, team, and date range for the Games Schedule page.

start_date.description: Filter games on or after this date (ISO date), e.g., '2026-05-01'

end_date.description: Filter games on or before this date (ISO date)

interfaces.name: addGameToMySchedule
interfaces.description: Add a specific game to the user’s My Schedule list.

interfaces.name: removeGameFromMySchedule
interfaces.description: Remove a specific game from the user’s My Schedule list using the game ID.

interfaces.name: getMyScheduleGames
interfaces.description: Get all games currently saved in the user’s My Schedule section, for use on the My Schedule and My Dashboard pages.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get month, field, role, time-of-day, and sort options for the Volunteer Opportunities page.

interfaces.name: searchVolunteerShifts
interfaces.description: Search volunteer shifts by month, field, role, and time of day for the Volunteer Opportunities page.

date_start.description: ISO date for the first day to include

date_end.description: ISO date for the last day to include

earliest_start_time.description: Minimum shift start time in 24h format, e.g., '17:00'

latest_start_time.description: Maximum shift start time in 24h format

interfaces.name: getVolunteerShiftDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific volunteer shift before signup.

interfaces.name: submitVolunteerSignup
interfaces.description: Submit a signup for a selected volunteer shift, capturing volunteer contact information.

interfaces.name: getMyVolunteerShifts
interfaces.description: Get all confirmed volunteer commitments for the user, for the My Volunteer Shifts section and My Dashboard.

interfaces.name: cancelVolunteerSignup
interfaces.description: Cancel a previously confirmed volunteer signup.

interfaces.name: getStoreCategories
interfaces.description: Get store categories such as Apparel, Hats, and Accessories for the League Store navigation.

interfaces.name: getCategoryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for a specific store category (e.g., Apparel, Hats, Accessories).

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search products within a store category with filters for type, price, rating, and size segment.

active_only.description: If true, only return active products

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific product, including images, description, price, rating, and available options.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a configured product to the shopping cart. Creates a cart if one does not already exist.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents and totals for the Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of an existing item in the cart.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item from the cart.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get an order summary and available shipping methods before collecting shipping details on the Checkout page.

interfaces.name: submitOrder
interfaces.description: Submit the order at checkout, including shipping method, shipping address, and contact info.

interfaces.name: getClinicFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get month, skill focus, price range, and sort options for the Clinics & Camps page.

interfaces.name: searchClinics
interfaces.description: Search clinics and camps by month, skill focus, price range, and training hours.

interfaces.name: getClinicDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific clinic, including schedule, price, and total training hours.

interfaces.name: submitClinicRegistration
interfaces.description: Submit a registration for a selected clinic, capturing player and guardian details.

interfaces.name: getFieldReservationFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available dates, divisions, fields, and time windows for the Fields & Reservations page.

interfaces.name: searchFieldReservationSlots
interfaces.description: Search available one-hour field reservation slots by date, division, time window, and field features.

date.description: ISO date for which to view slots

require_lights.description: If true, only include fields with lights

interfaces.name: getFieldReservationSlotDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific field reservation slot before confirming a booking.

interfaces.name: submitFieldReservation
interfaces.description: Confirm a field reservation for a selected slot, capturing team and coach information.

interfaces.name: getTeamFinderFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get division, skill level, practice day, and radius options for the Team Finder page.

interfaces.name: searchTeams
interfaces.description: Search teams by division, skill level, ZIP code, radius, and practice days for the Team Finder page.

interfaces.name: getTeamDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific team, including practice schedule and coach contact information.

interfaces.name: saveTeamToMyTeams
interfaces.description: Save a team to the user’s My Teams list, optionally with a descriptive note.

interfaces.name: getMyTeams
interfaces.description: Get all teams saved to the user’s My Teams list for display on My Dashboard or dedicated pages.

interfaces.name: removeSavedTeam
interfaces.description: Remove a team from the user’s My Teams list.

interfaces.name: getRuleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get division and category filter options for the Rules & Policies page.

interfaces.name: listRuleDocuments
interfaces.description: List rule and policy documents filtered by division and category for the Rules & Policies page.

interfaces.name: getRuleDocumentDetails
interfaces.description: Get full text and metadata for a specific rule or policy document.

interfaces.name: saveRuleDocumentToMyResources
interfaces.description: Save a rule or policy document to the user’s My Resources list.

interfaces.name: getMyResources
interfaces.description: Get all rule and policy documents saved in the user’s My Resources list.

interfaces.name: removeSavedResource
interfaces.description: Remove a saved rule or policy from the user’s My Resources list.

interfaces.name: getDashboardSummary
interfaces.description: Get a consolidated summary for the My Dashboard page, including My Schedule, My Volunteer Shifts, My Teams, and My Resources.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current open cart from storage or create a new Cart record when none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal, estimated tax, shipping estimate, and total after cart changes.

helperFunctions.name: _saveSingleUserState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist single-user state for saved games, teams, resources, and volunteer signups without a userId parameter.
